title: Mango Weapon
description: A mango gun that shots mangos.
body:
The Mango Gun is a custom ranged weapon that fires mangos as projectiles. Instead of arrows or snowballs, the player can load mangos as ammo. When shot, the mango flies through the air like a projectile, splattering on impact. Depending on how you set it up, it could:

Damage mobs like a bow or crossbow, with knockback from the mango’s impact.

Apply effects (ex: slow enemies with sticky mango pulp, or heal allies if shot at them).

Break blocks like weak leaves or glass with a juicy explosion.

Custom sounds/particles: splat effects, mango chunks flying, juice particles.

Crafting recipe: maybe crafted from iron, wood, and mangos.

Durability: the gun could wear down over time or be enchantable (Power, Unbreaking, etc.).

It could be silly and fun, or balanced like a proper ranged weapon.
chatgpt was not used
